title: Grassy Silky Venezuelan Sirloin Steak Tips Bowl
description: A delicious weeknight dish featuring sirloin steak tips in a creamy coconut sauce, served over a bed of fluffy rice.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sirloin steak tips and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until browned.
Transfer the cooked steak to a plate and set aside.
In the same skillet, melt the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, or until fragrant.
Pour in the coconut cream and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
Stir in the lime juice and season with salt to taste.
Return the cooked steak tips to the skillet and toss to coat.
Serve the steak and sauce over a bed of fluffy rice, garnished with chopped cilantro.
